title: subscribe_events missing connection-phase timeout
description: fetch_session and call both set .timeout(Duration::from_secs(30)) on their requests (fixing jmap-chat-tui-4u4.13), but subscribe_events applies no timeout to its initial GET request. If the server accepts TCP and sends HTTP headers arbitrarily slowly, the subscribe_events call hangs indefinitely before the stream even starts. The timeout should be applied only to the connection/header phase; once the stream body is open no per-read timeout is appropriate (SSE is long-lived). Fix: add .timeout(Duration::from_secs(30)) to the req builder in subscribe_events before calling .send(), matching the pattern used in fetch_session and call.
